div.class: d-flex flex-column align-items-center mb-3 p-1 p-lg-3 border border-warning rounded-3 bg-warning-subtle text-warning fs-3
fs-4 fw-bold d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center text-center gap-2

div.div: The electronic invoice process returned an error. Please review the invoice details from the backend to print the SUNAT compliant electronic document.
